title: Porcelain & Brass Submarine
description: A complete procedural hard-surface submarine assembled from a tilted-collar hull loft, UV-space apertures and ornament, parallel-transport sweeps, revolved fittings, lens-section fin lofts, a furnished glass cabin, a shrouded eight-blade propeller, generated material textures, and explicit per-part topology evidence.
techniques: arc-length UVs and UV-space aperture ownership
procedural hull ornament and quilt normal textures
